title: Facial massaging mask
abstract: A facial massage device configured to be positioned on a human face may include a plurality of layers. An intermediate portion may be disposed between an outer cover and an inner liner. The intermediate portion may include a plurality of individually actuatable massage elements. In some cases, the individually actuatable massage elements may be pneumatically actuated. In other cases, the individually actuatable massage elements may be mechanically actuated. The facial massage device may further include a control module configured to actuate the plurality of individually actuatable massage elements.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A facial massage device, comprising: an outer cover; an inner liner; an intermediate portion disposed between the outer cover and the inner liner, the intermediate portion including a plurality of individually aetuatable massage elements; and a control module configured to actuate the plurality of individually aetuatable massage elements. 2. The facial massage device of claim 1, wherein the intermediate portion comprises an intermediate pressure pouch including a plurality of individually aetuatable compartments and further comprising a first fluid source may be fluidly coupled to the plurality of individually aetuatable compartments. 3. The facial massage device of claim 2, wherein the control module is configured to inflate and/or deflate the plurality of individually aetuatable compartments in a predefined order. 4. The facial massage device of claim 3, wherein the predefined order is from a forehead area of the facial massage device to a chin area of the facial massage device. 5. The facial massage device of claim. 3, wherein the predefined order is from an inner area of the facial massage device to an outer area of the facial massage device. 6. Tire facial massage device of claim 3, wherein the predefined order is from a first side of the facial massage device to a second side of facial massage device. 7. The facial massage device of any one of claims 2-6, wherein the first fluid source includes a cooling mechanism for cooling a fluid before delivery to the individually aetuatable compartments. 8. The facial massage device of any one of claims 2-7, wherein the first fluid source includes a heating mechanism for heating a fluid before delivery to the individually actuatable compartments. 9. The facial massage device of any one of claims 2-8, further comprising a second fluid source configured to deliver an ion mist adjacent to the inner liner. 10. The facial massage device of any one of claims 2-8, further comprising a second fluid source configured to deliver steam adjacent to the inner liner. 1 1. The facial massage device of any one of claims 2-10, wherein the intermediate pressure pouch comprises two layers of polyurethane heat welded along a plurality of seams to define the plurality of individually actuatable compartments. 12. The facial massage device of any one of claims 2-11, wherein the control module is configured to operate a fluid delivery to the individually actuatable compartments in accordance with a user defined order. 13. The facial massage device of claim 1, wherein the intermediate portion comprises an intermediate frame including an elongate bridge element and two or more arms extending laterally from the elongate bridge and the plurality of individually actuatable massage elements comprises at least one massaging node positioned at an end of each of the two or more arms. 14. The facial massage device of claim 13, wherein the at least one massaging node comprises a vibrating massage node. 15. The facial massage device of claim 13, wherein the at least one massaging node comprises a rotating base having at least one generally spherical massaging element disposed thereon. 16. The facial massage device of claim 13, wherein the at least one massaging node comprises a rotating cam. 17. The facial massage device of any one of claims 1-16, wherein the inner liner comprises a gel material disposed within a membrane.
